hero.title: Learn smarter, not harder
hero.subtitle: A Claude MCP server that turns AI conversations into scientifically optimized flashcards — with spaced repetition, Bloom's Taxonomy tracking, and interactive study sessions.

features.sectionSubtitle: LearnForge combines proven learning science with modern AI to help you truly understand — not just memorize.

fsrs.title: FSRS Algorithm
fsrs.description: Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler optimizes your review intervals based on your actual performance. Each card is scheduled individually — you review exactly when you need to.

bloom.title: Bloom's Taxonomy
bloom.description: Track your cognitive depth from Remember to Create. Cards progress through six levels as your understanding deepens, ensuring you don't just memorize but truly master concepts.

ai.title: Claude MCP Integration
ai.description: LearnForge connects to Claude via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Talk to Claude about what you want to learn — it creates interactive flashcards with KaTeX formulas, SVG diagrams, and multiple-choice questions using LearnForge's tools.

screenshots.dashboardDesc: Track your progress with streaks, accuracy, and card state overview.
screenshots.studyDesc: Interactive cards with KaTeX formulas, MCQ, and spaced repetition ratings.
screenshots.cardsDesc: Browse, filter, and search your entire card collection by topic and Bloom level.

step1.title: Connect Claude
step1.description: Add LearnForge as an MCP server in Claude Desktop or your Claude client. This gives Claude access to flashcard creation, study scheduling, and review tools.

step2.title: Learn with Claude
step2.description: Tell Claude what you want to study. It creates rich, interactive flashcards with formulas, diagrams, and quizzes — all stored in your LearnForge instance.

step3.title: Study & Master
step3.description: Review cards in the web app or via Claude. FSRS schedules your reviews at optimal intervals while Bloom's Taxonomy tracks your understanding depth.

katex.title: KaTeX Formulas
katex.description: Beautiful math rendering for STEM subjects

svg.title: SVG Diagrams
svg.description: Visual learning with custom diagrams and charts

search.title: Semantic Search
search.description: Find related cards by meaning, not just keywords

darkTheme.title: Dark & Light Theme
darkTheme.description: Adapts to your system preference for comfortable studying

pricing.title: Free for 30 days
pricing.subtitle: Try LearnForge with full access. No credit card required.
pricing.note: After your trial: EUR 2/month, billed annually at EUR 24/year.
pricing.donation: Support the project with a donation
pricing.prerequisite: Requires a Claude Pro, Team, or Enterprise subscription for AI features.
